creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Well, the previous comment was lacking context, sorry.

- with the *last* patch proposed (the "if (high_heap_size > 0 && 0) {" one), I get "malloc failure"

- the "stable_10.patch", does not make a difference for me, it still prints

gptzfsboot: error 1 lba 32
gptzfsboot: error 1 lba 1
gptzfsboot: No ZFS pools located, can't boot
